site.title: Yuanmei Printing — Custom Packaging Manufacturer | Dongguan, China
site.description: 18 years of custom box manufacturing. Food packaging, gift boxes, corrugated boxes, color cards. ISO-certified, 50+ skilled workers, global delivery.

hero.description: From concept to delivery — custom printed boxes, food-grade packaging, and premium gift boxes. 5 large presses, 50 skilled craftsmen, ISO-certified production.

productsSection.label: What We Make
productsSection.title: Packaging Solutions for Global Brands
productsSection.description: Specializing in short to medium runs with fast turnaround. MOQ as low as 50 pieces per design.

items.title: 18 Years Experience
items.desc: Founded in 2008, serving 40+ countries with deep packaging expertise. Annual capacity: 2 million+ boxes.

items.title: In-House Production
items.desc: 5 large offset presses (Komori & Roland), prepress, die-cutting, gluing — all under one roof.

items.title: Food-Grade Certified
items.desc: FDA and EU food contact compliant materials. Strict quality control at every stage.

items.title: Low MOQ, Fast Delivery
items.desc: Starting from 50 pieces per design. 7–15 day production turnaround with DDP shipping.

ctaSection.title: Ready to Start Your Packaging Project?
ctaSection.description: Tell us about your needs — we'll reply within 24 hours with a free quotation and design suggestions.

items.question: What is your minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
items.answer: Our MOQ starts as low as 50 pieces per design for custom boxes. For larger or more complex orders, we're flexible — contact us to discuss your specific needs.

items.question: What materials and finishes do you offer?
items.answer: We work with grey board (1200gsm), coated art paper, kraft paper, duplex board, corrugated/E-flute, and more. Finishing options include hot foil stamping, spot UV, matte/gloss lamination, embossing, debossing, and soft touch coating.

items.question: How long does production take?
items.answer: Standard production takes 7–15 days depending on order complexity and quantity. Rush orders can be accommodated — please mention your timeline when inquiring.

items.question: Do you ship internationally? What shipping methods?
items.answer: Yes! We ship to 30+ countries worldwide. We offer sea freight, air freight, and DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) shipping for a hassle-free experience. Your dedicated account manager will help you choose the best option.

items.question: Can I get a sample before bulk production?
items.answer: Absolutely. We provide free pre-production samples so you can verify quality, materials, and design before committing to full production. Sample production typically takes 3–5 days.

items.question: Are your materials food-grade certified?
items.answer: Yes. Our food packaging materials comply with FDA 21 CFR and EU EC 1935/2004 regulations for direct and indirect food contact. We can provide certification documentation upon request.

products.title: Our Products
products.description: Browse our complete range of custom packaging solutions. Click any category to learn more or request a quote.

categories.title: Food Packaging Boxes
categories.description: Food-grade custom packaging: strawberry punnets, chocolate boxes, pastry boxes. FDA and EU compliant materials.

categories.title: Custom Gift Boxes
categories.description: Premium rigid boxes, collapsible gift boxes, magnetic closure boxes. Perfect for cosmetics, jewelry, candles, and luxury goods.

categories.title: Corrugated & Shipping Boxes
categories.description: Custom-printed shipping boxes, mailer boxes, and e-commerce packaging. Built for protection and brand experience.

categories.title: Color Cards & Inserts
categories.description: Product color cards, hang tags, instruction inserts, and promotional cards. With custom finishes and coatings.

about.title: About Yuanmei Printing
about.description: 18 years of packaging excellence. From a small workshop to a trusted global manufacturer.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Founded in 2008 in Dongguan, Guangdong — China's manufacturing heartland — Yuanmei Printing has grown from a small workshop into a trusted packaging partner for brands across 30+ countries. We combine traditional craftsmanship with modern printing technology to deliver packaging that protects products and elevates brands.

items.name: Komori Lithrone G40
items.desc: 5-color offset press with coater. Handles up to 720×1,030mm sheet size. High-speed precision printing for medium to large runs.

items.name: Roland 700 Series
items.desc: 4-color offset press. Renowned for consistent color reproduction and quick job changeover. Ideal for short to medium runs.

items.name: Die-Cutting Machines
items.desc: 3 automatic die-cutting lines for precise cutting of custom shapes, creasing, and perforation.

items.name: Folder-Gluer Lines
items.desc: 2 high-speed folder-gluer machines with automatic quality inspection. Handles complex box structures.

items.name: Hot Foil Stamping
items.desc: Cylinder and platen foil stamping machines for gold, silver, and holographic foil application.

items.name: UV & Lamination
items.desc: Full sheet UV coating, spot UV, matte and gloss lamination — all in-house.

items.name: ISO 9001:2015
items.desc: Quality management system certified. Consistent processes from inquiry to delivery.

items.name: FDA Food Contact
items.desc: Materials and inks comply with FDA 21 CFR for direct and indirect food contact.

items.name: EU Food Contact (EC 1935/2004)
items.desc: European regulation compliance for food contact materials and articles.

items.name: FSC Certified
items.desc: Forest Stewardship Council certified — sustainable paper sourcing available on request.
